Confirm the assignment is specific, credible, and ready for a narrow publish path.

Edit
Publish Assignment

REVIEW READINESS

Ready to publish.

Everything needed for the narrow publish path is present. Publish when your team is ready to start matching.

Role purpose

Name the role and why the work matters.

Work summary

Describe the real work before publishing.

Outcomes

Add at least one outcome the reviewer can recognize.

Proof expectations

Say what proof would count for this assignment.

Must-have skills

Attach the skills reviewers should use as anchors.

1
Why this role exists

Role

Proof operations lead with a deliberately long review title

Engagement type

Contract / consulting

Role purpose

Lead the review loop for regulated proof intake.

2
What work will actually be done

Work summary

Own the assignment review workflow, clarify what work is expected, and keep the team aligned on what delivery actually matters.

Review quality

Target: Raise review completeness • Timeframe: First month

3
What proof would count

Proof expectations

Show delivered proof operations work with clear ownership, bounded evidence, and outcomes a reviewer can inspect.

Verification requirements

Work Email Verification
4
What practical constraints are real

Compensation range

SEK 80,000 - 100,000

Location

Remote

5
Internal review checklist

Must-have skills and proof expectations are ready for internal review.

Evidence review (Level 4/5)
Privacy operations (Level 4/5)
